title: The Future of AI
description: A deep dive into artificial intelligence and how it's reshaping our world — from healthcare to creative industries. We explore the ethical implications and the humans behind the breakthroughs.

title: Mindful Mornings
description: Start your day with intention. This episode covers morning routines, mindfulness practices, and the science behind why how you wake up shapes your entire day.

title: Startup Stories
description: Three founders share their journeys — the pivots, the failures, the unexpected wins. An honest look at what it really takes to build something from nothing.
